ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test job */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the test job */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test job was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the test job */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environment in which the test job runs */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the test job (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Exact start time of the test job */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Exact end time of the test job */,
  "total_duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Total duration of the test job in seconds */,
  "num_test_cases" INTEGER /* Number of test cases in the job */,
  "num_passed" INTEGER /* Number of passed test cases */,
  "num_failed" INTEGER /* Number of failed test cases */,
  "num_fixed" INTEGER /* Number of fixed test cases */,
  "num_skipped" INTEGER /* Number of skipped test cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_jobs_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_jobs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("email")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test job the test case belongs to */,
  "axis" TEXT /* Axis or category of the test case */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the test class */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the test method */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test case (e.g., PASSED, FAILED, FIXED) */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the test case execution in seconds */,
  "executed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was executed */,
  "test_case_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the test case */,
  "test_case_type" TEXT /* Type of the test case (e.g., unit test, integration test) */,
  "test_case_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the test case */,
  "test_case_tag" TEXT /* Tag for the test case */,
  "test_case_output" TEXT /* Output or logs of the test case execution */,
  "retry_count" INTEGER /* Number of retries for the test case */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("email"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES test_jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the environment */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of the environment (e.g., development, staging, production) */,
  "environment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the environment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last use of the environment */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environments_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("email"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("email")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA engineer, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("email")
)
